$comment: Unity MCP servers bridged into pi by pi-mcp-unity. Tools are namespaced <server-key>__<tool>. ${ENV_VAR} is substituted from the environment at connect time.

unity.$comment: Commercial Coplay product (coplay-mcp-server, source: CoplayDev/coplay-unity-plugin). Disabled by default in favor of the open-source MCP for Unity below.

coplaydev-unity.$comment: Open-source MCP for Unity (CoplayDev/unity-mcp, PyPI: mcpforunityserver, script: mcp-for-unity). Requires the MCPForUnity Unity package installed and 'Start Server' in the Unity MCP window. Tools register as coplaydev_unity__*. Disabled by default; opt in from the extensions panel.
